records.ety: [OE. odor, odour, OF. odor, odour, F. odeur, fr. L. odor; akin to olere to smell, Gr. 'o`zein, Lith. sti. Cf. Olfactory, Osmium, Ozone, Redolent.]

defs: Any smell, whether fragrant or offensive; scent; perfume.
quotes: Meseemed I smelt a garden of sweet flowers, That dainty odors from them threw around.
